note: worktree was dirty at task creation

Decision: changes_requested (revision 1). Validation rerun evidence: cd apps/web && npm run build passed; cd apps/web && npm run lint clean; npm run guard:worktree passed; git diff --check clean; protected path status/diff clean; elevated cd apps/web && npx playwright test e2e/portrait-comparison.spec.ts passed 5/10 with 5 skipped; elevated cd apps/web && VITE_USE_MOCK=false npx playwright test e2e/portrait-comparison.spec.ts passed 6/10 with 4 skipped. Blocking issues: (1) The real-contract responsive test is not actually under controlled real-contract conditions. In VITE_USE_MOCK=false output, the mobile test produced proxy ECONNREFUSED/502 for /api/v0/portrait-comparisons/readiness and /api/v0/portrait-comparisons?archiveFilter=active&limit=20 because that test does not install page.route intercepts and no real backend is running. Handoff claims all requests are intercepted and warnings are harmless, but the run shows the Portrait Comparison API was not intercepted in test 9. Acceptance must either intercept every API route used by the responsive test with backend-shaped DTOs or start a real backend/workspace and document it. (2) W08 brief required responsive coverage for desktop + mobile and long run id/checksum/source text; current responsive test only checks body.scrollWidth on the history view after navigation and does not open detail or use long backend-shaped fields. Handoff itself lists this as an open question, so it is not accepted. (3) Brief required updating docs/notes-app.md and checklist execution facts; docs/notes-app.md still only records T0042, and checklist still showed T0043 queued until controller review. Required fix: add real-contract controlled responsive coverage for detail view with long run id/checksum/source/source text, assert body and documentElement scrollWidth (and relevant visible containers if practical); avoid unhandled backend proxy errors in VITE_USE_MOCK=false by intercepting all needed routes or starting real backend; update docs/notes-app.md and W08 checklist execution fact; rerun all required validations and protected path checks. Memory Used: Real-contract Playwright intercepts must mirror backend DTO and Match visual assertions to screenshot-visible containers affected the review decision; metadata updated. W09 remains planned and blocked; do not create next task.
